---
title: Physics Concepts as Indicative Framework to Ex-ante Model Systems of Economies

subtitle: Coincise Notes and Conjectures Explorations of Natural Laws to Preliminarly Structure Economies for Allocating Finite Resouces under Constrains

author: Eugenio Net
date: today

bibliography: references.bib  
csl: diabetologia.csl

nocite: |
  @*  
---


---


\
\
<p style="text-align: center; color: slategray;">
*WORKING NOTES DRAFT* <br>
</p> 

\
\


# Abstract {#sec-abstract}

{{< include Content/abstract.qmd >}}
\
\


# Introduction {#sec-introduction}

{{< include Content/intro.qmd >}}
\
\

# Work and Energy {#sec-workenergy}

{{< include Content/work-energy.qmd >}}
\
\

# Constrains and Conditions {#sec-constraints}

{{< include Content/constraints.qmd >}}
\
\

# Ex-ante Framing and Post-ante Optimization {#sec-optimization}

{{< include Content/optimization.qmd >}}
\
\

# Productiviy and Value {#sec-productivityvalue}

{{< include Content/econom.qmd >}}
\
\

# Hypothesis and Conjecture {#sec-hypothesis}

{{< include Content/hypothesis.qmd >}}
\
\


# Acronyms

{{< include Content/acronyms.qmd >}}
\
\


{{< include Content/prefooter.qmd >}}
___
